title: aggregate (combine-wave) output data
description:
Shape of the ``data`` field on a successful ``aggregate --run-id <id> --wave <N>`` envelope.

Note: ``combined: false`` is a SUCCESSFUL envelope (the call
recorded the failure to the journal); inspect ``data.combined``
to branch.

combined.description: True when the cluster-side combiner exited 0 and the wave landed in combined_waves. False when the combiner exited non-zero and the wave landed in failed_waves; inspect stderr_tail.
combined.title: Combined

output_dir.description: Absolute path on the cluster where the wave's combined partial was written.
output_dir.title: Output Dir
